title: Deep learning-based protocol to construct an immune-related gene network of host-pathogen interactions in plants
author: Kumar, Ravi
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Investigating network behavior from host-pathogen interactions is challenging. Here, we present the deep-learning-based protocol to construct an immune-related gene network and list the genes involved in the defense response of the host to specific biotic stress. The protocol includes the steps to pre-process the interaction pairs and expression profile of plants treated with pathogen/control, feed as input for the DLNet algorithm to rank genes based on their contribution to data classification. The top-ranked genes are subjected to module and enrichment analysis.
steps_raw: Investigating network behavior from host-pathogen interactions is challenging. Here, we present the deep-learning-based protocol to construct an immune-related gene network and list the genes involved in the defense response of the host to specific biotic stress. The protocol includes the steps to pre-process the interaction pairs and expression profile of plants treated with pathogen/control, feed as input for the DLNet algorithm to rank genes based on their contribution to data classification. The top-ranked genes are subjected to module and enrichment analysis.
keywords: Effectors, Pathogen, Plant immune response, Machine Learning, Systems Biology, Network, Protein Disorder
